text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Repeated creation of 'Internet Settings\\Connect' registry keys across multiple user profiles and the default profile by svchost.exe. This registry path is a common target for malware to control network traffic or establish persistence.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "Internet Settings\\Connect",
    "HKU\\.DEFAULT",
    "HKU\\S-1-5-20",
    "HKU\\S-1-5-21"
  ]
}
